scripts.test:unit: node --experimental-strip-types --test src/sim/clothMeshCuts.test.ts src/cloth/patternAssembly.test.ts src/cloth/mergeClothAssemblies.test.ts src/character/shirtDressing.test.ts src/character/mergeBoneSdfCapsules.test.ts src/character/rigForwardMeasure.test.ts src/character/CharacterController.facing.test.ts src/character/facingTurnAudit.test.ts src/character/facingAlignmentAudit.test.ts src/animations/rigDressSequence.test.ts src/animations/characterAnimationProfile.test.ts src/animations/animationClipCalibration.test.ts src/animations/meshBindCalibration.test.ts src/animations/trimAnimationClip.test.ts src/animations/loopMatch.test.ts src/scenes/characterDuel/characterDuelAnimation.test.ts src/sim/boneSdfSweptCollision.test.ts src/character/breastPhysics.test.ts src/garments/garmentSchema.test.ts
scripts.test:unit:ci: npm run audit:clips && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:bb:bg: playwright test tests/bb-motion.spec.ts > /tmp/lavery-bb-motion.log 2>&1 & echo "BB motion tests running in background — tail -f /tmp/lavery-bb-motion.log"
scripts.test:smoke:bg: playwright test --config playwright.smoke.config.ts > /tmp/lavery-smoke.log 2>&1 & echo "smoke tests running in background — tail -f /tmp/lavery-smoke.log"
